title: Alembic Migration: Phase 8 Schema (ai_provider_configs, conductor_dispatches, review_recommendations, mcp_bridge_configs, project_integrations)
description:
Neue Alembic-Migration (011_) für alle Phase-8-Tabellen und Schema-Erweiterungen.

**Neue Tabellen:**

1. `ai_provider_configs` — Per-Agent-Rolle AI-Provider-Konfiguration:
   - `id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid()`
   - `agent_role VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE` — z.B. 'kartograph', 'stratege', 'architekt', 'worker', 'gaertner', 'triage', 'reviewer'
   - `provider VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL` — 'anthropic', 'openai', 'google', 'ollama', 'github_models', 'custom'
   - `model VARCHAR(200)` — z.B. 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', 'gpt-4o', 'llama3.1'
   - `endpoint VARCHAR(500)` — Custom-Endpoint-URL (Ollama, Custom)
   - `endpoints JSONB` — Pool-Konfiguration: [{"url": "...", "weight": 1, "healthy": true}]
   - `pool_strategy VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'round_robin'` — 'round_robin', 'weighted', 'least_busy'
   - `api_key_encrypted BYTEA` — AES-256-GCM verschlüsselter API-Key
   - `api_key_nonce BYTEA` — Nonce für AES-256-GCM
   - `rpm_limit INTEGER` — Requests per Minute (NULL = kein Limit)
   - `tpm_limit INTEGER` — Tokens per Minute (NULL = kein Limit)
   - `token_budget_daily INTEGER` — Tägliches Token-Budget
   - `enabled BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT true`
   - `created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now()`
   - `updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now()`

2. `conductor_dispatches` — Audit-Trail für Conductor-Dispatches:
   - `id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid()`
   - `trigger_type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL` — 'task_state', 'epic_state', 'event'
   - `trigger_id VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL` — z.B. Task-Key oder Event-ID
   - `trigger_detail VARCHAR(500)` — z.B. 'state:scoped→in_progress'
   - `agent_role VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL` — dispatched Agent-Rolle
   - `prompt_type VARCHAR(100)` — z.B. 'worker_implement', 'reviewer_check'
   - `execution_mode VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'local'` — 'local' oder 'github_actions'
   - `status VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'dispatched'` — 'dispatched', 'running', 'completed', 'failed', 'cooldown_skipped'
   - `cooldown_key VARCHAR(300)` — Idempotenz-Schlüssel
   - `result JSONB` — Ergebnis nach Abschluss
   - `dispatched_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now()`
   - `completed_at TIMESTAMPTZ`
   - Indexes: `(trigger_type, trigger_id)`, `(agent_role, dispatched_at)`, `(cooldown_key) WHERE status = 'dispatched'`

3. `review_recommendations` — AI-Review Audit-Trail:
   - `id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid()`
   - `task_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES tasks(id) ON DELETE CASCADE`
   - `reviewer_dispatch_id UUID REFERENCES conductor_dispatches(id) ON DELETE SET NULL`
   - `recommendation VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL` — 'approve', 'reject', 'needs_human_review'
   - `confidence FLOAT NOT NULL` — 0.0 – 1.0
   - `checklist JSONB` — [{"item": "DoD #1", "passed": true, "comment": "..."}]
   - `reasoning TEXT` — Begründung des Reviewers
   - `grace_period_until TIMESTAMPTZ` — Wann Grace Period abläuft (für Auto-Approve)
   - `auto_approved BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false`
   - `vetoed_by UUID REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL`
   - `vetoed_at TIMESTAMPTZ`
   - `created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now()`
   - Indexes: `(task_id, created_at DESC)`, `(grace_period_until) WHERE auto_approved = false AND vetoed_at IS NULL`

4. `mcp_bridge_configs` — Externe MCP-Server-Verbindungen:
   - `id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid()`
   - `name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE`
   - `namespace VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE` — Tool-Prefix: 'github', 'gitlab', 'slack'
   - `transport VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL` — 'stdio', 'sse', 'http'
   - `command VARCHAR(500)` — stdio: Befehl (z.B. 'npx @modelcontextprotocol/server-github')
   - `args JSONB` — stdio: Argumente
   - `url VARCHAR(500)` — sse/http: URL
   - `env_vars_encrypted BYTEA` — AES-256-GCM encrypted env vars
   - `env_vars_nonce BYTEA`
   - `enabled BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT true`
   - `tool_allowlist JSONB` — NULL = alle, Liste = nur diese
   - `tool_blocklist JSONB` — Tools die nie proxied werden
   - `discovered_tools JSONB` — Cache des Tool-Katalogs
   - `created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now()`
   - `updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now()`
   - CHECK: `namespace != 'hivemind'` (reserviert)

5. `project_integrations` — GitHub Projects V2 Sync-Konfiguration:
   - `id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid()`
   - `project_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE`
   - `integration_type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL` — 'github_projects'
   - `github_repo VARCHAR(200)` — 'owner/repo'
   - `github_project_id VARCHAR(100)` — GraphQL Node ID
   - `status_field_id VARCHAR(100)` — GitHub Status Field ID
   - `priority_field_id VARCHAR(100)` — GitHub Priority Field ID
   - `sync_enabled BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT true`
   - `sync_direction VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'bidirectional'` — 'bidirectional', 'hivemind_to_github', 'github_to_hivemind'
   - `created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now()`
   - `updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now()`
   - UNIQUE: `(project_id, integration_type)`

**Erweiterung bestehender Tabelle:**
- `app_settings`: Neuer Eintrag `('governance', '{"review":"manual","epic_proposal":"manual","epic_scoping":"manual","skill_merge":"manual","guard_merge":"manual","decision_request":"manual","escalation":"manual"}')` — Default: alles manual

Datei: `backend/alembic/versions/011_phase8_autonomy_tables.py`

criteria: `alembic upgrade head` läuft fehlerfrei — alle 5 Tabellen werden erstellt
ai_provider_configs: UNIQUE auf agent_role, BYTEA-Felder für verschlüsselten Key
conductor_dispatches: Indexes auf (trigger_type, trigger_id) und cooldown_key
review_recommendations: FK auf tasks(id) und conductor_dispatches(id), Index auf grace_period_until
mcp_bridge_configs: CHECK constraint namespace != 'hivemind', UNIQUE auf name und namespace
project_integrations: FK auf projects(id), UNIQUE auf (project_id, integration_type)
